title: New DFU screen - Translations
scenario: DFU screen displays correctly with proper translations and no broken text across supported languages
steps: 1. Set the phone system language to a supported language (e.g., English, French, German, Japanese, etc.).
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Ensure a Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) is connected and a firmware update is available for that device.
4. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
5. Locate and tap the "Firmware Update" or "DFU" option to open the new DFU screen.
6. Observe all text elements on the DFU screen, including title, description, update progress indicators, buttons (e.g., "Update", "Cancel"), and any status messages.
7. Verify that all text is fully visible (not truncated or cut off), properly translated, and contains no broken words, overlapping elements, or missing characters.
expected: All text on the DFU screen is fully visible, correctly translated into the selected language, with no broken words, truncation, overlapping, or missing characters.
